rulings.Case Title: MORIA FONG ET AL VS. KENNETH LEW ET AL
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for August 28, 2017 line 1. CROSS DEFENDANTs BALDINI REAL ESTATE, INC. and BRUNO BALDINI's DEMURRER TO 1ST AMENDED CROSS COMPLAINT OVERRULED, 10 days to answer. Causes of action for breach of fiduciary duty and negligence are based on several distinct wrongdoings. These causes of action are not barred by the Statute of Limitations and are sufficiently alleged as the claims of "causing unpermitted work" and "supplying unlicensed contractors." Cause of action for conversion is sufficiently alleged.= (501/REQ)

rulings.Case Title: MORIA FONG ET AL VS. KENNETH LEW ET AL
rulings.Calendar Matter: MOTION TO STRIKE 1ST AMENDED CROSS COMPLAINT
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for August 28, 2017 line 1. CROSS DEFENDANTs BALDINI REAL ESTATE, INC. and BRUNO BALDINI's MOTION TO STRIKE 1ST AMENDED CROSS COMPLAINT DENIED. Request for punitive damages is sufficiently alleged.= (501/REQ)

rulings.Case Title: BRECKENRIDGE PROPERTY FUND 2016, LLC VS. CHRIS NORRIS ET AL
rulings.Calendar Matter: Ntc Of Mtn And Mtn For Terminating Sanctions Against Christopher Hart For Failure To Comply With Court'S Order; Req. For Monetary Sanctions In The Amount Of $660.00 Against Deft
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for August 28, 2017 line 5. PLAINTIFF BRECKENRIDGE PROPERTY FUND 2016, LLC's Motion For Terminating Sanctions Against Christopher Hart For Failure To Comply With Court'S Order; Req. For Monetary Sanctions In The Amount Of $660.00 Against Deft GRANTED, subject to opposition. The order granting terminating sanctions shall be stayed and shall become null and void if Defendant provides responsive document to response #3 of Request for Production (copies of personal checks, cashier's checks, money orders, and or receipts for rental payments) by overnight mail (with tracking number) to Plaintiff within 5 days of notice of entry of order.= (501/REQ)

rulings.Case Title: XIAO ZHEN WU VS. KEITH HENRY ARMSTRONG ET AL
rulings.Calendar Matter: Notice Of Motion And Motion For Terminating Sanctions As To Plaintiff Xiao Zhen Wu
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for August 28, 2017 line 6. DEFENDANTs KEITH ARMSTRONG and SUMMER SIMPSON's Motion For Terminating Sanctions As To Plaintiff Xiao Zhen Wu GRANTED. Plaintiff failed to comply with her obligations under the Discovery Act and failed to comply with Court's order. The action shall be dismissed.= (501/REQ)
